productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Rally Brown Casual Shoes
description: A fresh take on the classic sneaker, this nike Air Rally shoe is sure to become a love-forever classic in your shoe closet. Sleek silhouette and branded perforations make this piece classy yet perfect for dressing down. Wear this with denims and a tonal belt, along with your favourite tee.UpperLeather uppers with perforations for maximum breathability and protectionLace-ups for snug FitCushioned collar and lightly padded tongue for greater comfortSwoosh logo perforated on the sides and brand tab on the tongueMidsoleCushioned footbed for all-day comfortPhylon midsole with AirSole unit in the heel for maximum impact protection and superior cushioningOutsoleRubber outsole with herringbone pattern for traction and durabilityFlex grooves for greater flexibilty of the feetShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
